tldr_zh: Google發布萬能AI模型，SpaceX星艦V3首飛，美伊接近達成協議。
tldr_en: Google unveils versatile AI model, SpaceX Starship V3 first flight, US-Iran near deal.

items.title_zh: Google 發表「萬能」AI 模型，實現跨模態生成與互動
items.title_en: Google Unveils "Anything-to-Anything" AI Model for Cross-Modal Generation
items.summary_zh: Google 推出一款創新的 AI 模型，能將任何輸入（文字、圖像、音訊）轉換為任何輸出形式，展現了強大的跨模態生成能力。這項技術預示著 AI 互動方式的重大變革，可能徹底改變內容創作與人機介面。
items.summary_en: Google has introduced an innovative AI model capable of transforming any input (text, image, audio) into any output format, demonstrating powerful cross-modal generation. This technology signals a significant shift in AI interaction, potentially revolutionizing content creation and human-computer interfaces.

items.title_zh: AI 技術遭濫用，重現已故飛行員聲音引發爭議
items.title_en: AI Misused to Resurrect Voices of Deceased Pilots, Sparking Controversy
items.summary_zh: 有人利用 AI 技術從駕駛艙錄音的聲譜圖中重建已故飛行員的聲音，此舉引發道德爭議。美國國家運輸安全委員會（NTSB）因此暫時限制其檔案系統的存取，凸顯 AI 在隱私和倫理方面的挑戰。
items.summary_en: AI technology has been used to reconstruct the voices of deceased pilots from cockpit recording spectrograms, sparking ethical controversy. The NTSB temporarily blocked access to its docket system in response, highlighting AI's challenges regarding privacy and ethics.

items.title_zh: SpaceX 星艦 V3 首次試飛，助推器返航失敗
items.title_en: SpaceX Starship V3 Completes First Flight, Booster Lost on Return
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 成功發射升級版星艦 V3 進行首次試飛，這是實現其宏大太空目標的關鍵一步。儘管飛船本身表現良好，但助推器在返回過程中未能成功回收，顯示仍有技術挑戰待克服。
items.summary_en: SpaceX successfully launched its upgraded Starship V3 for its first test flight, a crucial step towards its ambitious space goals. While the spacecraft performed well, the booster was lost during its return, indicating remaining technical challenges.

items.title_zh: 微軟開源最早 DOS 原始碼，揭示早期作業系統發展史
items.title_en: Microsoft Open-Sources Earliest DOS Source Code, Revealing OS History
items.summary_zh: 微軟宣布開源迄今發現最早的 DOS 原始碼，為研究人員和開發者提供了寶貴的歷史資料。這項舉動不僅豐富了開源社群，也讓外界得以一窺早期個人電腦作業系統的發展歷程。
items.summary_en: Microsoft has open-sourced the earliest DOS source code discovered to date, providing valuable historical data for researchers and developers. This move enriches the open-source community and offers insight into the early development of personal computer operating systems.

items.title_zh: 馬斯克轉向天然氣與軌道數據中心，放棄地球太陽能
items.title_en: Elon Musk Shifts Focus to Natural Gas and Orbital Data Centers, Abandoning Earth Solar
items.summary_zh: 據報導，伊隆·馬斯克旗下的 xAI 全力投入天然氣，而 SpaceX 則專注於軌道數據中心，似乎已放棄他曾承諾的「太陽能電動經濟」。這標誌著馬斯克在能源策略上的重大轉變，引發外界對其未來方向的疑問。
items.summary_en: Elon Musk's xAI is reportedly all-in on natural gas, while SpaceX focuses on orbital data centers, seemingly abandoning his promised "solar-electric economy." This marks a significant shift in Musk's energy strategy, raising questions about his future direction.

items.title_zh: 美國 CISA 推出漏洞提報系統，加速威脅情資共享
items.title_en: US CISA Launches Vulnerability Reporting System to Expedite Threat Intelligence Sharing
items.summary_zh: 美國網路安全暨基礎設施安全局（CISA）推出新的漏洞提報表單系統，旨在讓研究人員和合作夥伴更容易通報已遭利用的漏洞。此舉將有助於 CISA 更快地識別、驗證並分享關鍵威脅情資，強化國家網路安全。
items.summary_en: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has launched a new vulnerability nomination form system to make it easier for researchers and partners to report exploited vulnerabilities. This initiative will help CISA more quickly identify, validate, and share critical threat intelligence, enhancing national cybersecurity.

items.title_zh: 美國 ICE 簽署 2500 萬美元虹膜掃描合約，引發隱私疑慮
items.title_en: US ICE Awards $25M Iris-Scanning Contract, Raising Privacy Concerns
items.summary_zh: 美國移民及海關執法局（ICE）向 Bi2 Technologies 授予一份價值 2500 萬美元的虹膜掃描合約，用於生物識別技術。這項大規模的政府採購引發了外界對數據隱私和公民自由的潛在影響的擔憂。
items.summary_en: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) has awarded Bi2 Technologies a $25 million contract for iris-scanning biometric technology. This large-scale government procurement raises concerns about data privacy and potential impacts on civil liberties.

items.title_zh: 美伊接近達成協議，有望結束戰爭並重啟荷姆茲海峽
items.title_en: US and Iran Nearing Deal to End War, Reopen Strait of Hormuz
items.summary_zh: 美國與伊朗官員表示，雙方已接近達成一項旨在結束戰爭的協議，其中可能包括重新開放關鍵的荷姆茲海峽。這項進展為中東地區的緊張局勢帶來了緩解的希望，儘管核武器問題仍未納入初步框架。
items.summary_en: U.S. and Iranian officials indicate they are close to a deal aimed at ending the war, potentially including the reopening of the crucial Strait of Hormuz. This development offers hope for de-escalation in the Middle East, though the issue of nuclear weapons is not part of the initial framework.

items.title_zh: 白宮附近發生槍擊案，特勤局擊斃嫌犯並波及路人
items.title_en: Secret Service Shoots Suspect Near White House, Bystander Wounded
items.summary_zh: 一名嫌犯在白宮附近檢查站向特勤局人員開火後被擊斃，一名路人也因此受傷。這起事件導致白宮周邊區域一度封鎖，凸顯了美國首都的安全挑戰。
items.summary_en: A suspect was shot and killed by Secret Service agents after opening fire near a White House checkpoint, with a bystander also wounded. The incident led to a temporary lockdown of the area around the White House, highlighting security challenges in the U.S. capital.

items.title_zh: 俄羅斯衛星逼近支援烏克蘭的雷達衛星，引發太空安全疑慮
items.title_en: Russian Satellites Approach Ukraine-Supporting Radarsat, Raising Space Security Concerns
items.summary_zh: 四顆俄羅斯衛星已進入一家支援烏克蘭的 ICEYE 雷達衛星的「打擊範圍」內，這種近距離接觸對於典型任務而言並不尋常。此舉引發了對太空軍事化和衛星安全的新一輪擔憂，可能加劇國際緊張局勢。
items.summary_en: Four Russian satellites have moved within "striking distance" of an ICEYE radarsat supporting Ukraine, an unusual proximity for typical missions. This action raises new concerns about space militarization and satellite security, potentially escalating international tensions.

items.title_zh: 中國山西煤礦氣爆釀 82 死，成 16 年來最嚴重礦災
items.title_en: Chinese Coal Mine Explosion Kills 82 in Shanxi, Worst Disaster in 16 Years
items.summary_zh: 中國山西省發生一起嚴重的煤礦氣爆事故，造成至少 82 人死亡，成為該國 16 年來最慘重的礦業災難。這起事件再次凸顯了中國礦業安全生產的嚴峻挑戰。
items.summary_en: A severe coal mine explosion in China's Shanxi province has killed at least 82 people, marking the country's worst mining disaster in 16 years. This incident once again highlights the severe challenges in mining safety production in China.

items.title_zh: 川普司法部刪除網站上關於 1 月 6 日事件的新聞稿
items.title_en: Trump's Justice Department Scrubs Jan. 6 News Releases from Website
items.summary_zh: 川普政府的司法部已從其網站上刪除了所有關於 1 月 6 日國會山莊事件被告的新聞稿。此舉引發了外界對政府透明度及政治干預司法獨立的質疑。
items.summary_en: The Trump administration's Justice Department has removed all news releases concerning January 6th Capitol riot defendants from its website. This action has raised questions about government transparency and political interference in judicial independence.
